yield_predictions.recommendation: NPK levels are optimal for rice. Expect good yield this Kharif season.
Moderate nitrogen levels. Consider top dressing urea at tillering stage.
Ensure frequent irrigation. Potassium levels are good.

treatment: Remove and destroy infected plant parts immediately
Apply Tricyclazole 75% WP at 0.6g per litre of water
disease_detections.pesticide_recommendation: Tricyclazole 75% WP — spray every 10 days until symptoms reduce

treatment: Apply Mancozeb 75% WP at 2.5g per litre
Ensure proper spacing between plants for air circulation
disease_detections.pesticide_recommendation: Mancozeb 75% WP — apply 2 sprays with 15-day interval

treatment: Remove and burn infected plants to prevent spread
Control leafhopper vectors using recommended insecticides
Plant resistant maize varieties in next season
disease_detections.pesticide_recommendation: Imidacloprid 17.8% SL — apply at 0.5ml per litre to control leafhoppers

treatment: Set up pheromone traps at 5 per acre for early detection
Spray Chlorpyrifos 20% EC at 2.5ml per litre
Avoid excessive use of nitrogen fertilizer
disease_detections.pesticide_recommendation: Chlorpyrifos 20% EC — spray during evening hours for best results

treatment: Apply Propiconazole 25% EC at 1ml per litre
Ensure good field drainage to reduce humidity
Avoid dense planting to improve air circulation
disease_detections.pesticide_recommendation: Propiconazole 25% EC — apply 2 sprays at 15-day intervals

treatment: Monitor weekly for any early signs

crop_recommendations.reason: High humidity and rainfall in Karnataka make rice the best fit for Kharif season.
Cool dry conditions in Maharashtra favour wheat during the Rabi season.
Punjab's fertile loamy soil and canal irrigation system is ideal for wheat.

weather_alerts.message: Heavy rainfall expected in the next 2 days (45mm)
weather_alerts.action_required: Skip irrigation for next 2 days. Ensure proper field drainage.
Water your crops early morning or after sunset to reduce evaporation.

weather_alerts.message: Weather conditions are favorable for farming
weather_alerts.action_required: Continue your regular irrigation and farming schedule.
